title: nlink-lab ps --json output
description: Emitted by `nlink-lab ps --json`. Array of tracked background processes, both alive and exited. Exited entries are kept (`alive: false`) until the lab is destroyed; consumers polling for liveness must check the `alive` field, not just the PID.

node.description: Node the process was spawned in.

pid.description: Linux PID of the spawned process.

alive.description: True if `kill(pid, 0)` returns 0. Stays false after the process exits — the entry is kept for post-mortem inspection.

stdout_log.description: Absolute path to the captured stdout log. Omitted when not captured.

stderr_log.description: Absolute path to the captured stderr log. Omitted when not captured.
